# POC Proof Point Template

Use this template for `poc-proofpoint.md` when all stories have reached [Done] and passed QA.

# Project Deliverable Sign-off (POC)

All stories have been completed, reviewed, and have passed the final quality audit by the `QA Agent`.

The project is now ready for final human review and sign-off.

**Status**: [PENDING_APPROVAL]

To approve this project, change the status to `[APPROVED]`.
To reject this project, change the status to `[REJECTED]` and provide feedback in this document.
